metadata.title: Sara

[00:15.24] Wait a minute, baby

[00:53.01] Drowning in the sea of love

[01:07.85] But now it's gone, it doesn't matter what for

[01:18.92] Then call me home
[01:22.60] 
[01:37.25] And he was just like a great dark wing

[01:52.42] I think I had met my match
[02:00.54] He was singing

[02:39.86]
